item.title: 黑石集团格雷为信贷投资组合估值辩护，股价持续下跌
item.description: 黑石集团总裁乔恩·格雷——其公司旗舰私募信贷基金遭遇创纪录赎回——将市场担忧称为"大量噪音"，而黑石股价已跌至2023年11月以来的最低点。【原文：Blackstone Inc. President Jon Gray — whose company’s flagship private credit fund was hit by record redemptions — called the concerns in the market a “ton of noise” as Blackstone shares fell to the lowest level since November 2023.】

item.title: 卢拉政府不愿在巴西银行巨额亏损后援助巴西复兴银行
item.description: 卢拉政府正抵制向巴西银行（BRB）提供金融救助的提议。这家国有银行由政治对手掌控，因涉及Banco Master SA的亏损而面临增资压力。【原文：President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva’s government is resisting the idea of extending a financial lifeline to BRB, a state-owned bank controlled by a political adversary and under pressure to bolster capital after losses tied to Banco Master SA.】

item.title: 战争扰乱霍尔木兹海峡，俄罗斯获得提升石油收入的机会
item.description:
飙升的油价和印度可能重启采购的潜力，或将为克里姆林宫的战争资金注入新的活力

【原文：

Soaring prices and potential for renewed Indian buying could boost Kremlin’s war chest

】

item.title: 米莱扩大激励计划将吸引页岩油投资者
item.description: 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱为吸引投资而推出的旗舰计划即将迎来新一轮原油生产商的申请，此前其政府已将该计划扩大至涵盖页岩油井。【原文：President Javier Milei’s marquee program for luring investment into Argentina is poised to attract a new round of applications from crude producers after his administration broadened it to include shale oil wells.】

item.title: Vale Base Metals首席执行官称公司计划年中完成首次公开募股准备
item.description: 淡水河谷基本金属公司正加紧筹备其庞大的镍铜业务，力争在年中之前完成首次公开募股，时间比此前预期的更早。【原文：Vale Base Metals is working to get its sprawling nickel-and-copper business ready for a potential initial public offering by midyear, sooner than previously indicated.】

item.title: 阿波罗集团罗温警告私募市场即将面临洗牌
item.description: 阿波罗全球管理公司首席执行官马克·罗温警告称，随着业界对软件公司贷款违约率上升的担忧浪潮涌现，私募信贷公司即将面临洗牌。【原文：Apollo Global Management Inc. Chief Executive Officer Marc Rowan warned that a shakeout is coming for private credit firms as the industry faces a wave of concerns about rising defaults on loans to software companies.】

item.title: 英国预算责任办公室称，人工智能可能推高失业率却无法提振经济增长
item.description: 英国预算责任办公室的分析显示，人工智能可能导致英国就业岗位流失，却无法带来相应的经济增长。【原文：Artificial intelligence could cost the UK jobs without delivering any growth in return, according to an analysis conducted by the Office for Budget Responsibility.】

item.title: 加拿大承诺投入26亿加元推动关键矿产项目
item.description: 加拿大正逐步推进约35亿加元（26亿美元）的投资与计划，以加速关键矿产资源的开发进程。【原文：Canada is moving closer to deploying around C$3.5 billion ($2.6 billion) in investments and programs to accelerate development of critical minerals deposits.】

item.title: 波利市场赌客静候哈梅内伊死亡时间之争
item.description: 在Polymarket平台上押注超过1.15亿美元的赌客们正焦急等待最终答案：伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊是否会在2月28日前卸任？【原文：Polymarket bettors with more than $115 million on the line are stuck waiting for a definitive answer to the question: Was Ayatollah Ali Khamenei “out” as supreme leader of Iran by Feb. 28?】

item.title: 卢帕卡黄金公司在美国起诉秘鲁政府，要求执行6900万美元仲裁裁决
item.description: 一家加拿大黄金开采公司在美国起诉秘鲁政府，试图追讨因暴力抗议导致其在该南美国家的一座矿山停产而获得的约6900万美元赔偿金。【原文：A Canadian gold mining company sued Peru in the US as part of efforts to collect around $69 million it was awarded over violent protests that halted operations at one of its mines in the South American nation.】

item.title: 施密德称美联储不可对持续高企的通胀掉以轻心
item.description: 堪萨斯城联邦储备银行行长杰夫·施密德重申通胀率过高，并补充称最新数据显示通胀水平已比美国央行的目标高出近1个百分点。【原文：Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City Jeff Schmid reiterated that inflation is too high, adding that the latest numbers suggest it’s nearly a percentage point above the US central bank’s target.】

item.title: 埃及寻求缓解对伊朗战争经济影响的担忧
item.description: 埃及采取行动以缓解市场对伊朗战争影响经济的担忧，同时警告称，若冲突持续，可能需要采取"非常规"措施来应对大宗商品价格上涨。【原文：Egypt moved to ease concerns over the Iran war’s impact on the economy, while warning “extraordinary” measures may be needed to tackle commodity prices if the conflict drags on.】

item.title: Audible推出更实惠的套餐以吸引流媒体用户
item.description: 亚马逊旗下有声读物平台Audible正推出更优惠的套餐方案，此时正值其与Spotify Technology SA的竞争日益激烈——后者将有声读物与音乐及播客打包销售。【原文：Amazon.com Inc.’s Audible is launching a cheaper plan at a time of growing competition with Spotify Technology SA, which bundles audiobooks with music and podcasts.】

item.title: 美联储威廉姆斯称降息幅度取决于通胀进展
item.description: 纽约联邦储备银行行长约翰·威廉姆斯表示，若关税影响基本消退后通胀进一步放缓，则有必要进一步降息。【原文：Federal Reserve Bank of New York President John Williams said additional interest-rate cuts will be warranted if inflation slows further once most of the impact of tariffs has passed.】

item.title: 黄金暴跌，因强势美元与收益率抵消战争风险溢价
item.description: 黄金价格在连续四日上涨后暴跌逾5%，交易员们权衡了中东局势升级与美元走强及通胀加剧的前景。【原文：Gold slumped more than 5% after a four-day rally as traders weighed the escalating war in the Middle East against the prospect of a stronger dollar and elevated inflation.】

item.title: 英国考虑重启国债拍卖机制以提升国债流动性
item.description: 英国表示，可能重启所谓的切换拍卖机制以提升国债市场的流动性。【原文：The UK said it may revive so-called switch auctions to improve gilt-market liquidity.】

item.title: 阿联酋市场将于3月4日恢复交易，此前因伊朗危机暂停交易
item.description: 阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布，因美以对伊朗开战及中东地区冲突而关闭两日后，两大关键市场将于3月4日重新开放交易。【原文：The United Arab Emirates said two key markets will reopen for trading on March 4, after two days of closure due to the US-Israeli war on Iran and conflict across the Middle East.】

item.title: 伊拉克启动大规模减产，霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势加剧原油库存积压
item.description: 据熟悉该国运营情况的人士透露，随着储油罐逐渐填满，伊拉克已开始关闭其最大油田的石油生产，若霍尔木兹海峡危机持续，该国准备每日减产约300万桶原油。【原文：Iraq started shutting oil production at its biggest fields as storage tanks fill up, and is poised to shutter about 3 million barrels a day of output if the Hormuz crisis persists, according to people familiar with the operations.】

item.title: 加拿大零售商Roots在多年经营困境后考虑出售
item.description: 加拿大服装零售商Roots公司正进行战略审查，这可能导致这家拥有数十年历史的企业被出售。【原文：Canadian clothing retailer Roots Corp. is pursuing a strategic review that may lead to the sale of the decades-old company.】

item.title: 伊朗战争迫使波兰化肥制造商暂停新订单
item.description: 随着中东局势紧张加剧以及关键生产要素天然气价格飙升，波兰国有化肥生产商已暂停接收新订单。【原文：Poland’s state-run fertilizer producer has temporarily stopped taking new orders as tensions soar in the Middle East and the price of gas, a key input, surges.】

item.title: 英伟达挑战者叛乱公司聘请摩根大通为韩国IPO提供服务
item.description: 人工智能芯片初创企业Rebellions Inc.已任命摩根大通公司为其在首尔首次公开募股的全球牵头承销商，为韩国备受瞩目的科技企业上市铺平道路。【原文：AI chip startup Rebellions Inc. has appointed JPMorgan Chase & Co. as global lead underwriter for its initial public offering in Seoul, setting the stage for one of South Korea’s most closely watched technology debuts.】

item.title: 苹果发布升级版MacBook Pro、MacBook Air及新款Studio显示器
item.description: 苹果公司更新了其两大笔记本电脑产品线，为MacBook Air和MacBook Pro配备了更快的处理器，以期重振销售。【原文：Apple Inc. updated its two main laptop computer lines, adding faster processors to the MacBook Air and MacBook Pro in a bid to reignite sales.】

item.title: 天然气危机冲击秘鲁企业，配给制正式启动
item.description: 就在波斯湾战争导致全球油价飙升之际，秘鲁主要天然气田停止供气，这对依赖廉价能源的国内产业造成了冲击。【原文：Peru’s main natural gas fields have stopped shipping fuel just as global prices are spiking due to the war in the Persian gulf, hitting national industries that depend on cheap power.】

item.title: 劳力士爱好者通过卡尔西合约押注手表价格
item.description: 奢华腕表爱好者如今可以押注自己心爱的劳力士价格走势，或是预测百达翡丽将停产哪款型号。【原文：Luxury watch devotees can now bet on where the price of their beloved Rolex is headed or which model Patek Philippe will discontinue.】

item.title: 挪威能源部长称该国增产天然气能力有限
item.description: 挪威能源部长表示，该国天然气生产商正接近满负荷运转，这给试图补充天然气库存的欧洲国家带来了更大压力。【原文：Norway’s natural gas producers are operating near full capacity, according to the country’s energy minister, putting further pressure on European nations looking to fill depleted stockpiles of the fuel.】

item.title: 壳牌将向巴西Raízen公司投资35亿雷亚尔，巴西首席执行官表示
item.description: 壳牌公司宣布将向巴西乙醇生产商Raízen SA注资35亿雷亚尔（约合6.66亿美元），该公司是壳牌与Cosan SA的合资企业。【原文：Shell Plc is committed to inject 3.5 billion reais ($666 million) in Brazilian ethanol producer Raízen SA, a joint venture it has in partnership with Cosan SA.】

item.title: 鲍曼称美联储应审视流动性规则的有效性
item.description: 美联储首席银行监管官员表示，监管机构应评估其流动性规则在市场波动时期对贷款机构的影响，并解决该框架中的缺陷。【原文：The Federal Reserve’s top bank cop said the regulator should weigh how its liquidity rules affects lenders during times of volatility and address weaknesses in the framework.】

item.title: 英国财政状况好转，国债发行量降至三年低点
item.description: 英国正大幅削减国债发行规模，降至三年来的最低水平，这反映出该国财政状况有所改善。【原文：The UK is slashing its bond sales to a three-year low, reflecting an improvement in the country’s finances.】

item.title: 伊拉克暂停经关键输油管道向土耳其港口输送原油
item.description: 据知情人士透露，伊拉克已暂停从其半自治的库尔德斯坦地区向土耳其杰伊汉港出口石油。【原文：Iraq has halted oil exports from its semi-autonomous Kurdistan region to the port of Ceyhan in Turkey, according to people with direct knowledge of the situation.】

item.title: 捷克央行预测经济将强劲增长，扩张幅度超出预期
item.description: 捷克央行表示，继去年超预期的强劲增长之后，该国经济增长势头正日益强劲。【原文：Economic growth in the Czech Republic is becoming more robust after a stronger-than-expected expansion last year, according to the central bank.】
